instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The revelation of Jesus Christ which God gave to Him to show to His slaves the things that must quickly take place; and He made it known by signs, sending it by His angel to His slave John,
output: La revelación de Jesucristo, que Dios le dio, para mostrar a Sus esclavos las cosas que deben suceder pronto; y la declaró en señales enviándola por medio de Su ángel a Su esclavo Juan,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who testified the word of God and the testimony of Jesus Christ, even all that he saw.
output: que ha dado testimonio de la palabra de Dios, y del testimonio de Jesucristo, de todas las cosas que ha visto.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy and keep the things written in it, for the time is near.
output: Bienaventurado el que lee, y los que oyen las palabras de esta profecía, y guardan las cosas en ella escritas; porque el tiempo está cerca.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: John to the seven churches which are in Asia: Grace to you and peace from Him who is and who was and who is coming, and from the seven Spirits who are before His throne,
output: Juan, a las siete iglesias que están en Asia: Gracia y paz a vosotros de parte de Aquel que es y que era y que ha de venir, y de los siete Espíritus que están delante de Su trono;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And from Jesus Christ, the faithful Witness, the Firstborn of the dead, and the Ruler of the kings of the earth. To Him who loves us and has released us from our sins by His blood
output: y de Jesucristo, el Testigo fiel, el Primogénito de entre los muertos, y el Soberano de los reyes de la tierra. Al que nos ama, y nos liberó de nuestros pecados con Su sangre,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And made us a kingdom, priests to His God and Father, to Him be the glory and the might forever and ever. Amen.
output: e hizo de nosotros un reino, sacerdotes para Su Dios y Padre; a Él sea gloria e imperio por los siglos de los siglos. Amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Behold, He comes with the clouds, and every eye will see Him, even those who pierced Him; and all the tribes of the land will mourn over Him. Yes. Amen.
output: He aquí que viene con las nubes, y todo ojo le verá, aun los que le traspasaron; y todas las tribus de la tierra harán lamentación por Él. Sí, amén.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I am the Alpha and the Omega, says the Lord God, He who is and who was and who is coming, the Almighty.
output: Yo soy el Alfa y la Omega dice el Señor Dios, el que es y que era y que ha de venir, el Todopoderoso.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I John, your brother and fellow partaker in the tribulation and kingdom and endurance in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos because of the word of God and the testimony of Jesus.
output: Yo Juan, vuestro hermano, y copartícipe vuestro en la tribulación, en el reino y en la perseverancia en Jesús, estaba en la isla llamada Patmos, por causa de la palabra de Dios y el testimonio de Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I was in spirit on the Lord’s Day and heard behind me a loud voice like a trumpet,
output: Yo estaba en el espíritu en el día del Señor, y oí detrás de mí una gran voz como de trompeta,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Saying, What you see write in a scroll and send it to the seven churches: to Ephesus and to Smyrna and to Pergamos and to Thyatira and to Sardis and to Philadelphia and to Laodicea.
output: que decía: Escribe en un rollo lo que ves, y envíalo a las siete iglesias: a Éfeso, a Esmirna, a Pérgamo, a Tiatira, a Sardis, a Filadelfia y a Laodicea.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And I turned to see the voice that spoke with me; and when I turned, I saw seven golden lampstands,
output: Y me volví para ver la voz que hablaba conmigo; y vuelto, vi siete candeleros de oro,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in the midst of the lampstands One like the Son of Man, clothed with a garment reaching to the feet, and girded about at the breasts with a golden girdle.
output: y en medio de los candeleros, a uno semejante al Hijo del Hombre, vestido de una ropa que llegaba hasta los pies, y ceñido por el pecho con un cinto de oro.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And His head and hair were as white as white wool, as snow; and His eyes were like a flame of fire;
output: Su cabeza y Sus cabellos eran blancos como blanca lana, como nieve; Sus ojos como llama de fuego;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And His feet were like shining bronze, as having been fired in a furnace; and His voice was like the sound of many waters.
output: y Sus pies semejantes al bronce reluciente, fundido en un horno; y Su voz como estruendo de muchas aguas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He had in His right hand seven stars; and out of His mouth proceeded a sharp two-edged sword; and His face shone as the sun shines in its power.
output: Tenía en Su diestra siete estrellas; de Su boca salía una espada aguda de dos filos; y Su rostro era como el sol cuando resplandece en su fuerza.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when I saw Him, I fell at His feet as dead; and He placed His right hand on me, saying, Do not fear; I am the First and the Last
output: Cuando le vi, caí como muerto a Sus pies. Y Él puso Su diestra sobre mí, diciéndome: No temas; Yo soy el Primero y el Último,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And the living One; and I became dead, and behold, I am living forever and ever; and I have the keys of death and of Hades.
output: y el Viviente; estuve muerto, mas he aquí que vivo por los siglos de los siglos. Y tengo las llaves de la muerte y del Hades.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Write therefore the things which you have seen and the things which are and the things which are about to take place after these things.
output: Escribe, pues, las cosas que has visto, y las que son, y las que han de ser después de éstas.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The mystery of the seven stars which you saw upon My right hand and the seven golden lampstands: The seven stars are the messengers of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
output: El misterio de las siete estrellas que has visto en Mi diestra, y de los siete candeleros de oro: las siete estrellas son los mensajeros de las siete iglesias, y los siete candeleros son las siete iglesias.
